trends.topic: Polymarket odds of a July Fed rate cut jump to 62%
trends.summary: Polymarket traders pushed the probability of a July Fed rate cut from 48% to 62% in 24 hours after softer-than-expected inflation data.
trends.angle: Surprising data point delivered as an authentic, energetic creator hot-take with a strong scroll-stopping hook.
trends.script_hook: Wait — the market just changed its mind about the Fed overnight.
trends.visual_prompt: Short-form VERTICAL 9:16 UGC video for Instagram Reels and TikTok, shot to look like authentic, organic iPhone selfie content — NOT a polished ad. SUBJECT: a charismatic, relatable Gen-Z creator in their mid-20s talking straight into a handheld front-facing phone camera with high, genuine energy, expressive hands and natural micro-movements. PERFORMANCE: they react with real surprise to a breaking finance story, opening with the punchy hook 'Wait — the market just changed its mind about the Fed overnight,' then keeping fast, conversational momentum. SETTING: a cozy, lived-in apartment with warm, soft natural window light, plants and everyday clutter softly blurred in a shallow-focus background. CAMERA: vertical 9:16, eye-level selfie framing, subtle handheld shake, slight push-ins, shallow depth of field, crisp modern smartphone look. GRAPHICS: bold kinetic on-screen captions pop in sync with the voice, and a clean animated data graphic shows the Fed rate-cut probability spiking from 48% to 62% with an upward arrow. EDITING: fast, punchy jump cuts, trend-aware pacing, a current upbeat trending audio bed. MOOD: confident, fun, native social energy, scroll-stopping. No watermarks, no logos, no garbled text.
